Why AstroAI?

Data-driven astrological insights powered by Swiss Ephemeris

Natal Chart Calculation

Precise planetary positions with 0.001 arcsecond accuracy using Swiss Ephemeris.

AI-Powered Readings

Personalized insights generated by GPT-4 & Claude, tailored to your unique context.

Geodetic Astrology

Understand how your birth location and relocations affect your energy patterns.

Relocation Analysis

Discover which cities support your career, relationships, and personal growth.

The Difference

📅

Traditional Horoscope

  • •Based on birth month only
  • •12 types for 8 billion people
  • •Focus: fortune telling
  • •~20-30% accuracy

AstroAI

  • ✓Date + Time + Location
  • ✓Unique for every individual
  • ✓Focus: purpose & patterns
  • ✓~70-95% accuracy

Chart = Blueprint, Not Destiny

Your natal chart is a map of potential — not a prison.

✋

You Can Reject

The chart shows tendencies, but you have free will to choose a different path.

⚡

You Can Accelerate

Seeing patterns means you can work smarter, not just harder.

🛤️

You Can Follow

Flow with your natural energy — not fighting, but not surrendering either.
